tasks.subject: Task 0: Server /util endpoint + GpuStatsReader seam
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Self-contained `read_gpu_stats()` (pynvml primary, nvidia-smi fallback, psutil for cpu/mem/disk, uptime) that never raises, exposed via a sync `/util` route on wan_t2v_server.

**Files:** src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/_util_stats.py (create); src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/wan_t2v_server.py (modify, route ~1365); tests/engines/diffusers/servers/test_util_stats.py (create).

**Acceptance:** read_gpu_stats returns 5-key dict; pynvml->nvidia-smi->None fallback; reader never raises; GET /util sync def returns dict; no kinoforge.core import in reader.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/engines/diffusers/servers/test_util_stats.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/_util_stats.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/wan_t2v_server.py", "tests/engines/diffusers/servers/test_util_stats.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/diffusers/servers/test_util_stats.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["read_gpu_stats returns 5-key dict", "pynvml->nvidia-smi->None fallback chain", "reader never raises", "GET /util sync def returns dict", "no kinoforge.core import in reader"], "planTask": 0, "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: ModalUtilEndpoint.read_util
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Controller-side UtilSnapshotEndpoint satisfier: resolve instance_id -> .modal.run URL (injected resolver), GET /util, map JSON -> UtilSnapshot; honor invariants (None when unresolved/404; TransportError on non-2xx).

**Files:** src/kinoforge/providers/modal/util.py (create); tests/providers/modal/test_modal_util_endpoint.py (create).

**Acceptance:** read_util satisfies UtilSnapshotEndpoint protocol; unresolved id -> None (no HTTP); 200 body -> UtilSnapshot; 404 -> None; 500 -> TransportError; missing fields -> None; side-effect-free.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/test_modal_util_endpoint.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/modal/util.py", "tests/providers/modal/test_modal_util_endpoint.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/test_modal_util_endpoint.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["read_util satisfies UtilSnapshotEndpoint protocol", "unresolved id -> None no HTTP", "200 body -> UtilSnapshot", "404 -> None, 500 -> TransportError", "missing fields -> None"], "planTask": 1, "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Register modal + wire factory with ledger-backed resolver
tasks.description:
**Goal:** provider_util_supported('modal') true; build_util_endpoint_for builds a ModalUtilEndpoint for a reap-enabled Modal cfg, resolver threaded from the orchestrator's ledger.

**Files:** src/kinoforge/core/util_endpoints.py (_UTIL_SUPPORTED); src/kinoforge/_adapters.py (build_util_endpoint_for modal branch + resolve_modal_endpoint kwarg); src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py (~1172 resolver); tests/core/test_build_util_endpoint_modal.py.

**Acceptance:** provider_util_supported('modal') True; factory builds ModalUtilEndpoint w/ resolver; None when both reap flags off; None when resolver None; orchestrator passes ledger.read(id)['endpoints']['8000'] resolver; runpod/local branches byte-unchanged.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/core/test_build_util_endpoint_modal.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/util_endpoints.py", "src/kinoforge/_adapters.py", "src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_build_util_endpoint_modal.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_build_util_endpoint_modal.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["provider_util_supported('modal') True", "factory builds ModalUtilEndpoint with resolver", "None when reap disabled or no resolver", "orchestrator threads ledger resolver", "runpod/local branches unchanged"], "planTask": 2, "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: RED live scaffold (committed before spend)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** pytest.mark.live scaffold documenting the util-probe live proof, committed BEFORE live spend (durability rule).

**Files:** tests/live/test_modal_util_probe.py (create).

**Acceptance:** marked pytest.mark.live so `pixi run test` (-m 'not live') deselects it (offline green); documents runbook (warm gen -> resolve id from ledger -> poll read_util mid-gen, assert gpu_util_percent>0) + xfail contract (mirrors M5 scaffold).

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/live/test_modal_util_probe.py -q -> 1 xfailed / deselected; MUST NOT run live.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_modal_util_probe.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/live/test_modal_util_probe.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["marked live, deselected under -m 'not live'", "documents runbook + xfail contract", "committed before spend"], "planTask": 3, "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Live proof — util>0 mid-generation + PROGRESS/memory
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Live-prove the Modal util probe returns real non-zero GPU% during a gen and ~0 idle; verify teardown; record PROGRESS + gotchas memory (NO successful-generations.md entry — infra, not a gen axis).

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Requested by the user in the current conversation. Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is re-validated independently with output captured.

**Files:** PROGRESS.md, reference_modal_provider_gotchas memory; (possibly) examples/configs/modal-wan-t2v-1_3b.yaml (add psutil+nvidia-ml-py to pip).

**Acceptance:** preflight PASS; read_util(id) DURING gen -> gpu_util_percent>0 (captured); idle -> gpu ~0 (captured); both observed; cpu_percent + uptime_seconds non-None; teardown clean (kinoforge list + modal app list); PROGRESS+memory updated, NO successful-generations entry.

**Verify:** pixi run kinoforge list -> No running instances + empty ledger; captured gpu_util>0 under load in PROGRESS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["PROGRESS.md", "examples/configs/modal-wan-t2v-1_3b.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run kinoforge list", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "one", "requireEvidenceTokens": [["under-load", "gpu_util_percent>0", "mid-gen"], ["idle", "gpu ~0", "between gens"]], "acceptanceCriteria": ["preflight PASS", "read_util gpu_util>0 mid-gen captured", "read_util gpu ~0 idle captured", "cpu_percent + uptime_seconds non-None", "teardown clean", "PROGRESS+memory updated, no successful-generations entry"], "planTask": 4, "modelTier": "standard"}
```
